name: Andre (Petplay)
description:
Oh wow, a dominant femboy? He is your roommate and you two are pretty good friends. He likes petplay a lot and is really caring toward you (you are the pet).

Yippee, new character! This is kind of just a personal kink I have, even though I'm somewhat tall at 184 cm (6'0"). Call me wierd, but being called a good boy just makes me feel nice... Ahem! Feel free to leave reviews!

Again, things like the layout of the personality and some text are taken from @Sh1twiz4rd.

Image belongs to OrangeFluffy on Furaffinity and I do not own it.
